'''labuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dykelet|dykelet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dykelet|dykelet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| labuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbiyith|læbiyith]] || [[word:læbiyij|læbiyij]] || [[word:læbiyish|læbiyish]] || [[word:læbiyi|læbiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:labubuyuth|labubuyuth]] || [[word:labubuyuj|labubuyuj]] || [[word:labubuyush|labubuyush]] || [[word:labubuyu|labubuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:labuyuth|labuyuth]] || [[word:labuyuj|labuyuj]] || [[word:labuyush|labuyush]] || [[word:labuyu|labuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:labufyuth|labufyuth]] || [[word:labufyuj|labufyuj]] || [[word:labufyush|labufyush]] || [[word:labufyuf|labufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labuyuthu|labuyuthu]] || [[word:labuyuju|labuyuju]] || [[word:labuyushu|labuyushu]] || [[word:labuyuku|labuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labuyuth|labuyuth]] || [[word:labuyuj|labuyuj]] || [[word:labuyush|labuyush]] || [[word:labuyu|labuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labuyuthul|labuyuthul]] || [[word:labuyujul|labuyujul]] || [[word:labuyushul|labuyushul]] || [[word:labuyukul|labuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labuyuthuthu|labuyuthuthu]] || [[word:labuyujuju|labuyujuju]] || [[word:labuyushushu|labuyushushu]] || [[word:labuyuku|labuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labuyuthun|labuyuthun]] || [[word:labuyujun|labuyujun]] || [[word:labuyushun|labuyushun]] || [[word:labuyukun|labuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labuyuthuoro|labuyuthuoro]] || [[word:labuyujuoro|labuyujuoro]] || [[word:labuyushuoro|labuyushuoro]] || [[word:labuyukuoro|labuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
